deviations.gdpr_quote: if the data subject considers that the processing of personal data relating to him or her infringes this Regulation.
deviations.policy_quote: if you believe that the processing of your personal data infringes data protection law.
deviations.mismatch: The policy broadens the condition for lodging a complaint from infringements of “this Regulation” (GDPR) to infringements of generic “data protection law.”
deviations.analysis: GDPR Art 77(1) ties the complaint right to infringements of the GDPR specifically, whereas the policy extends it to any data protection law, making it more permissive than required.
